about.description: Located in Porto Alegre, INCOCIL® meets the most demanding needs of the agricultural, road, and industrial sectors.

bento.subtitle: Technical excellence in every detail of the production process.

card_large.title: High Precision Honing

card_small_2.title: Flexible Delivery

blog.subtitle: Technical knowledge on hydraulics, pneumatics, and engineering.

footer.about: Specialist in manufacturing and maintenance of hydraulic and pneumatic cylinders from Porto Alegre to all of Brazil.

company.name: INCOCIL
company.address: 310 Ricardo Leonidas Ribas Ave - Porto Alegre/RS - Brazil

about_page.hero_subtitle: From Porto Alegre, transforming steel and precision into hydraulic solutions for the entire national territory.
about_page.history_description: INCOCIL® was born from the need to deliver cylinders that withstand the severe conditions of the Brazilian agricultural and industrial sectors. Strategically located in the Restinga Industrial District, our plant features high-precision honing and assembly processes.

pillars.title: Quality
pillars.desc: Technical rigor in every seal and finish.

pillars.title: Partnership
pillars.desc: Focus on the success of our customers' operations.

services.title: Stainless Steel Hydraulic Cylinder
services.description: Engineered for maximum durability and total corrosion resistance in aggressive environments.
services.longDescription: Developed and manufactured by INCOCIL specifically for the agricultural, chemical, and food sectors, featuring 100% stainless steel construction to withstand extreme conditions.
features: 100% Stainless steel construction (Tube, rod, head, and base)
Total resistance to corrosion from agrochemicals and moisture
Higher durability with reduced maintenance downtime costs
Custom-made projects according to required dimensions and force
applications: Marine environments or areas subject to chemical agents

technicalDetails.title: Quality and National Manufacturing
technicalDetails.content: Each unit is machined and tested in-house, following strict standards for dimensional precision and absolute sealing in harsh environments.
extras: Special Viton or Premium Polyurethane seals

services.title: Master-Slave Cylinder
services.description: High-precision synchronized systems for uniform heavy load movement.
services.longDescription: Solutions designed for applications requiring perfect synchronism between two or more actuators, ensuring leveling and precision in movement.
features: Reduction of complex external electronic components

technicalDetails.title: Advanced Hydraulic Synchronism
technicalDetails.content: Our master-slave systems eliminate the need for expensive external sensors through an intelligent and precise internal hydraulic design.
extras: Calculated sizing for real load capacity

services.title: Telescopic Cylinder
services.description: Compact solutions for long strokes, ideal for confined spaces.
services.longDescription: Multi-stage cylinders that allow for long reach while maintaining an extremely reduced and compact closed length.
features: Multiple stages (2 to 5 stages according to project)

technicalDetails.title: Multi-Stage Engineering
technicalDetails.content: We develop telescopic projects focused on lateral stability and smoothness during stage transitions.

services.title: Single and Double-Acting Cylinder
services.description: Versatility and robustness for various industrial and agricultural power applications.
services.longDescription: The pillars of industrial hydraulic force, offering extreme reliability for linear power movements in any sector.
features: Available in various mounting types (Clevis, Flange, Trunnion)
Return by gravity, spring, or hydraulic power
1045 steel rods with hard chrome plating

technicalDetails.title: INCOCIL Manufacturing Standard
technicalDetails.content: We use certified raw materials and automated welding processes to ensure each cylinder withstands continuous operation cycles.
extras: Custom painting according to customer standards

services.title: Hydraulic Cylinders
services.description: Excellence and warranty for a wide range of industrial and agricultural applications.
services.longDescription: Our complete line of hydraulic cylinders serves from simple projects to complex power systems across Brazil.
features: Manufacturing according to sample or technical drawing
Wide range of diameters and strokes

technicalDetails.title: Technical Development
technicalDetails.content: Our engineering team is available to assist in the correct sizing of the actuator for your specific application.

services.title: Pneumatic Cylinders
services.description: On-demand manufacturing and specialized maintenance focused on efficiency.
services.longDescription: Compressed air-powered actuators designed for fast, clean, and efficient automation in modern production lines.

technicalDetails.title: Automation and Speed
technicalDetails.content: Our pneumatic cylinders follow international standards to ensure interchangeability in imported and domestic machines.
extras: Stainless steel versions for sanitary areas

services.title: Honing Services
services.description: Capability from ø 25.40 to ø 500mm with reduced lead times.
services.longDescription: Ultra-precision abrasive machining process to ensure perfect geometry and roughness inside cylinder barrels.
features: Technical capacity for large diameters (up to 500mm)
Strict control of roughness (Ra and Rz)
Mirrored finish for maximum seal life

technicalDetails.title: Surface Technology
technicalDetails.content: Correct honing is the secret to perfect sealing and the durability of any hydraulic or pneumatic system.

services.title: Maintenance
services.description: Complete recovery with the same warranty as a new cylinder.
services.longDescription: Specialized overhaul and technical recovery service for cylinders of any brand, restoring factory performance.
features: Recovery or replacement of scratched rods

technicalDetails.title: INCOCIL Quality Warranty
technicalDetails.content: A cylinder recovered at INCOCIL undergoes the same pressure and sealing tests as new equipment, ensuring total safety.
extras: Pick-up and delivery available on request
